summary: Refined the Create Profile UX per the latest direction. NetworkTab now treats `Location Mode` as the canonical geolocation control, and custom coordinate inputs only appear and apply when `Location Mode` is `Custom`; the old separate enable checkbox behavior was removed. SecurityTab now uses the existing `ChipSelect` control for `Port Block Mode`, with `Port Block List` shown only for `allow_list` and `custom`. The Overview panel was reduced to exactly the requested fields: Operating System, OS Model, Browser, User Agent, Screen Resolution, Timezone, Language, Coordinates, Hardware, WebGL, Fonts, WebRTC, SSL, Ports, Media, Speech, and Rects. NotesTab was updated to use the textarea control API more directly, including its labeled textarea instance and input-driven summary sync. Lints for all modified files are clean.
current_status: Create Profile now follows the refined UI behavior: Location Mode owns geolocation behavior, Port Block Mode uses ChipSelect, Overview shows only the requested security/fingerprint fields, and Notes uses the textarea control properly. The broader plan-aligned payload/storage changes from the prior implementation remain in place.
